name: Oracle Aconex Construction Document Management API
what_it_does: Oracle Aconex REST API for construction and engineering project document management and collaboration platform. Enables AI agents to manage project documents and drawings, handle RFIs and submittals, manage workflow and approval processes, access correspondence and transmittals, integrate BIM model data, track project communications, and connect construction project data with ERP and scheduling systems.
use_cases: Managing project documents and drawing revisions from construction document control agents
Tracking RFI and submittal workflows from project engineering agents
Retrieving project correspondence and approval status from project management agents
Integrating construction data with ERP and finance systems from project control agents
not_for: Small construction projects without formal document control requirements
Residential construction without engineering-scale document management
IT document management without construction and engineering project focus
best_when: A large general contractor, owner, or engineering firm using Oracle Aconex on major capital projects wants AI agents to automate document workflows, RFI tracking, approval routing, and construction data integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction contract documents including change orders and RFIs have direct cost and schedule implications. Document errors on large capital projects can result in significant financial exposure.

auth.notes: Oracle Aconex uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Oracle Cloud credentials integration. Project-level authorization controls. Enterprise partner program required for third-party integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — major capital project enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-project enterprise pricing; Oracle subscription bundles available
pricing.notes: Australian company (Melbourne), acquired by Oracle in 2018. Dominant in major infrastructure, civil, and vertical construction globally. Used on many of the world's largest capital projects. Strong in Asia-Pacific and Middle East.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLAs for large projects

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction contract documents have direct cost and schedule implications on major projects
No public MCP server — REST API with Oracle OAuth2 enterprise partner program
Oracle acquisition — integration with Oracle Cloud suite; may require Oracle credentials
Multi-region data residency (US/EU/AU/AE) — verify for international project data
Major capital project complexity — document control workflows are project-specific
BIM data integration requires additional ACONEX BIM module — separate from document API
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Major capital project contract and engineering documents. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Oracle OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Oracle subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Capital project contract and engineering documents. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Oracle OAuth2. Multi-region data residency.
